About Fine custom quality carpentry

12+ years serving Seattle and surrounding areas

Fine Custom Quality Carpentry started with a simple goal: to bring unparalleled carpentry expertise to Seattle homeowners. We saw a need for reliable, skilled carpenters who understood the unique challenges and opportunities presented by Seattle's diverse housing stock and climate.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, expert execution, and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project, big or small. We use premium materials and time-tested techniques to deliver enduring quality.

We're proud to be a part of the Seattle community, contributing to the beauty and functionality of its homes. We actively support local initiatives and prioritize sustainable practices, ensuring our work benefits both our clients and the environment.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Fine Custom Quality Carpentry

Trusted carpenter professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
